top_signals.title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS – SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
top_signals.summary: S&P activity remained steady despite the relatively more cautious approach emerging amid the ongoing geopolitical developments in the Middle East. Market participants continue to monitor the evolving situation around the Strait of Hormuz and the US-Iran peace talks. Although vessel transits through the strait have gradually increased, uncertainty over the security of safe passage continues ...

top_signals.title: Eurozone Services Activity Revised Higher
top_signals.summary: The Eurozone Services PMI Business Activity Index rose to 49.4 in June of 2026 from 47.7 in the previous month, revised higher from the preliminary estimate of 48.9 and well above the earlier market expectations of 48.5. It was the softest downturn in the bloc’s services sector activity since the outbreak of war in the ...
